summary:
Oleuropein aglycone is not discussed in any of the provided medical evidence, and neither is there a reference to amyloid aggregation or related pathological processes. Consequently, based solely on the presented data, it cannot be concluded that oleuropein aglycone interferes with amyloid aggregation.  

$\boxed{\text{B}}$
